name: Oracle’s Chamber
summary: Lilith’s private upstairs sanctum where her strongest visions seize her.
description: The Oracle’s Chamber is Lilith’s private upstairs sanctum, rarely seen by guests. The walls are covered in lavender damask, and the windows are shrouded in heavy black velvet curtains that keep out nearly all external light. A reproduction iron-frame bed with an ornate canopy dominates one side of the room, draped in layered fabrics. Shelves along the walls hold dozens of small porcelain boxes, each labeled in Lilith’s meticulous hand and containing a token or fragment tied to a past vision: a scrap of cloth, a theater ticket, a broken earring, a shard of glass. Some boxes are locked; others sit slightly open, as if recently handled. The air feels thicker here, as if sound moves more slowly. Those who enter may experience fleeting flashes of borrowed sensation—an unfamiliar heartbeat, the taste of blood, the sound of glass breaking—especially if they spend time near the bed or the shelves. This is where Lilith most often succumbs to and interprets her strongest visions.
notes: Treat as the primary locus of Lilith’s visionary experiences. PCs should feel exposed to the Madness Network here.
owner_notes: Part of Lilith Nightshade’s private haven, the Violet Reliquary.
access_control: Interior access only; guests reach this room by invitation or escort.
security_notes: Access is tightly controlled by Lilith; only trusted guests or those tied to her visions are ever allowed inside.
ritual_space: Used by Lilith to interpret and stabilize visions tied to specific people or events.
relationship_notes: Interior room of the Violet Reliquary, haven of Lilith Nightshade.
